hero.name: Bertin Anlovi
hero.title: Data Engineer & Full Stack Developer
hero.subtitle: I build robust applications and analyze complex data to solve real-world problems.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: My journey, values, and vision
about.bio_p1: Computer Engineering graduate (Mention Assez-Bien) from École Polytechnique de Lomé, I build robust applications and analyze complex data. My hybrid profile covers Full Stack development (Angular, Django), data engineering (Python, Pandas) and Linux systems administration.
about.bio_p2: Currently working as a freelance Data Engineer, I take on concrete projects: analytics pipelines, secure APIs, HPC deployment. Laureate of the Huawei Seeds for the Future program, I represented Togo in an international AI competition in Essaouira, Morocco.
about.edu_school: École Polytechnique de Lomé · Université de Lomé
